    print(f"\n--- Testing {name} ---")
    print(f"URL: {url}")

        print(f"SUCCESS: Status code {response.getcode()}")
        content = response.read().decode('utf-8')
        print(f"Content: {content}")

        print(f"HTTP Error: {e.code} - {e.reason}")
        print(f"URL: {e.url}")

        print(f"URL Error: {e.reason}")
        
    except socket.timeout:
        print("Error: Request timed out")
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Unexpected error: {type(e).__name__}: {e}")

        print(f"URL: {url}")
        print(f"Status Code: {response.status_code}")
        print(f"Response Time: {end_time - start_time:.2f} seconds")
        print(f"Success: {'Yes' if response.status_code == 200 else 'No'}")

            print(f"Health: GOOD")
        elif 400 <= response.status_code < 500:
            print(f"Health: CLIENT ERROR - Check URL or authentication")
        elif 500 <= response.status_code < 600:
            print(f"Health: SERVER ERROR - Service may be down or overloaded")
        else:

        print(f"\n--- {name} ---")
        print(f"URL: {url}")

        print(f"URL: {url}")
        print(f"Status: CONNECTION FAILED")
        print(f"Health: CRITICAL - Cannot connect to server")

        print(f"URL: {url}")
